# GPT (Generative Pre-trained Transformer)

GPT is a family of large language models developed by [[OpenAI]].

Based on the [[Transformers]] architecture, GPT uses decoder-only transformer blocks.

Key versions:
- GPT-1 (2018)
- GPT-2 (2019)
- GPT-3 (2020)
- GPT-4 (2023)
